title: EC.dev
description: This portfolio website is a single-page application that showcases my resume, work, and background.
l_description: This single-page portfolio website serves as a digital resume, showcasing my work and background. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, it allowed me to enhance my web development skills, experiment with modern technologies, and improve my design aesthetics.
techs: HTML, CSS, TS, Tailwind, React, Next.js

title: Urban Luxe
description: Urban Luxe is a fictional and comprehensive e-commerce apparel web project aimed at honing my front-end development skills.
l_description: Urban Luxe is a fictional and comprehensive e-commerce apparel web project aimed at honing my front-end development skills. The objective was to build a fully functional and visually appealing online store from the ground up, utilizing frameworks such as Next.js and React while minimizing the use of external libraries. Additionally, the project focused on developing with backend integration in mind to achieve a robust and scalable architecture, while also emphasizing learning and implementing SEO best practices.
